variants.title: HiFi Filter OV 6076 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SAC-7903
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OV 6076 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SAKURA SAC-7903. Easy to install and replace, the OV 6076 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
